item.title: backlog show renders AC {text, verify} objects as raw JSON instead of plain text
item.intent: backlog show must display acceptance criteria as readable text — when entries are {text, verify} objects, only the text should be shown, not the JSON structure.
item.description: When backlog edit --ac 'Some check' --ac-verify 'make test' is used, the AC entry is stored as a JSON object {"text": "Some check", "verify": "make test"}. In cmd_backlog_show(), the jq display expression at line ~3720 uses (.acceptanceCriteria // [] | .[] | "  - \(.)"), which calls tojson on the entire object, producing output like: '  - {"text":"Some check","verify":"make test"}'. The fix is to check entry type: if it's a string, show it as-is; if it's an object, extract .text (and optionally show the verify command in a shorter form).
acceptanceCriteria: backlog show <ID> displays plain-string AC entries unchanged
backlog show <ID> displays {text, verify} AC entries as the .text value only (not raw JSON)
backlog show <ID> optionally shows verify command on same or next line in a readable format
